items.briefing:
Australian organisations are currently facing a double wave of cyber risk. End-of-financial-year pressures are leaving staff rushed and distracted, making them more likely to fall for phishing emails or make payment errors — a pattern cybercriminals actively exploit. At the same time, Amazon Prime Day is prompting a surge in online shopping scams, with fake deals and fraudulent websites targeting Australians looking for bargains.

If you receive any unexpected invoices, payment requests, or "too good to be true" deals this week, pause before clicking. Verify requests through a known phone number or official website rather than links in emails or messages.

featured.title: EOFY pressures drive cyber risk for Australian firms
featured.quote: EOFY deadline pressure exposes Australian finance teams to sophisticated scams during critical period.
